T0066.title: Resold Data
T0066.definition: Second-hand data refers to personal or corporate data that has been resold one or more times in illicit data trading markets.
T0066.description: Due to repeated reselling, this data often suffers from missing fields, outdated information, or tampering, significantly reducing its accuracy and validity. In the underground supply chain, second-hand data is typically used for broad-stroke scams or low-quality marketing campaigns. Its trading price is far lower than that of fresh data, and buyers are usually downstream fraudsters with limited budgets.
